scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,fb,ig,th -c red,blue,magenta,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web-app run dev" "npm --prefix instagram-app run dev" "npm --prefix threads-app run dev"
scripts.dev:facebook: concurrently -n api,web "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix web-app run dev"
scripts.dev:instagram: concurrently -n api,ig "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix instagram-app run dev"
scripts.dev:threads: concurrently -n api,th "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix threads-app run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix web-app run build && npm --prefix instagram-app run build && npm --prefix threads-app run build
